query: /akira scan repo:atlas
note: explicit invocation, scan mode

query: run /akira wander on my current branch diff before I commit
note: explicit, wander mode

query: /akira dao repo:nonprofit-success-ai — apply the safe fixes
note: explicit, dao mode

query: /akira all
note: explicit, all mode, no repo (cwd)

query: i just finished the auth refactor on this branch. can you do a quality check and tell me what i missed?
note: no explicit name; 'quality check' + 'what i missed' is akira territory (scan/wander)

query: look at this change properly — interrogate the intent, find the bugs, and fix what's safe to fix
note: describes wander->scan->dao = /akira all without naming it

query: what decisions did this diff walk past? what edge cases aren't handled?
note: wander's exact remit — questions about unaddressed intent

query: triage these findings and auto-apply the low-blast-radius ones behind the test suite, revert anything that breaks tests
note: dao's contract described without the name

query: can you scan the files I changed for concrete defects and rank them?
note: scan remit; competes with review-sweep but akira scan is the interactive form

query: give me 3-5 sharp questions about what this PR left unanswered
note: wander output shape verbatim

query: /review-sweep level:2 repo:atlas
note: explicit review-sweep — the standing report, not akira

query: run the standing review and write the report to the plan doc
note: 'standing report' + written artifact = review-sweep, not akira

query: /code-review lin-12-add-auth
note: explicit code-review — plan-fidelity against a plan doc

query: does this implementation match what the plan doc said we'd build? check plan fidelity.
note: plan-fidelity = code-review, not akira (akira is plan-agnostic)

query: run the full sanyi audit on the whole repo and flag cross-layer violations
note: /sanyi audit — contract enforcement, different tool

query: make test — run the pytest suite and show me failures
note: just running tests, zero-token mechanical, not a judgment pass

query: commit these changes with a conventional-commit message and push to origin
note: commit/push — Ramsey commits; not a review at all

query: refactor this 400-line module into smaller files, my call on the structure
note: open-ended refactor is normal work, not akira's triage-and-apply loop

query: review the open PR #42 on the librarian repo against our standards
note: PR review = /review-pr, akira is working-tree/diff shaped

query: why is this test flaky? it passes locally but fails in CI intermittently
note: debugging a specific failure, not a quality sweep of a diff
